title: Inside the Problem Workshop

image.alt: A red and black MathVilla workshop where masked antagonists design mathematical traps

paragraphs: The Architect is not working alone. Across the hidden workshop, specialist minds design, test, and deploy the problems that shape MathVilla.
Some create equations that conceal their own clues. Others refine traps, balance difficulty, and watch how every challenger responds.
Their shared purpose is control, but their different methods create weaknesses. Every disagreement leaves a seam; every overcomplicated puzzle leaves a path through.
To help the antagonist is to study the workshop closely—and decide whether its logic should be repaired or turned against its creators.
